case_title: LISA LEIGH DANOVICH, ASID VS. VICTOR POPOFF et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2008 - CONTINUED TO AUG-29-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO SERVE PLAINTIFF. PRO TEM COMMISSIONER: MICHELLE MCGILL, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DANOVICH, ASID, LISA LEIGH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT POPOFF, VICTOR POPOV, MILA ALEMASOV STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
